title: Durability warning mod
description:
Durability Warning

A lightweight client-side mod that alerts you when your tools are about to break.

Never accidentally destroy your favourite pickaxe again — get a clear warning when an item drops below 2.5% durability.
body:
🛠️ Durability Warning

Never break your tools by accident again.

Durability Warning is a lightweight client-side mod that alerts you when your tools are about to break — right when they drop below 2.5% durability.

Simple, clean, and designed to feel like vanilla.

⚡ Features
⚠️ Low durability alert
Get a clear warning when your tool is about to break
🔊 Subtle sound cue
Plays a quick alert sound so you don’t miss it
💬 Action bar message
No chat spam — clean and unobtrusive
🔁 Smart re-triggering
Repair your tool → it will warn you again next time
🧩 Client-side only
Works on any server (including vanilla)
🎮 Why use this?

Breaking a max-enchanted tool is one of the most frustrating things in survival.

This mod gives you just enough warning to react — without adding clutter, UI spam, or unfair advantages.

It fits seamlessly into vanilla gameplay.

⚙️ Requirements
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
Minecraft 1.21.1
🧠 How it works

The mod monitors the durability of items in your hands and triggers a warning when they drop below 2.5%.

It only alerts once per low-durability event to avoid spam, and resets automatically if the item is repaired.

💡 Design Philosophy
Vanilla-friendly
No gameplay advantage
No unnecessary features
Just solves a real problem
🚀 Future Plans (optional)
Armor durability warnings
Configurable threshold
Custom sounds / visual alerts
📦 Lightweight & Efficient

Minimal performance impact, no background overhead — just a simple check each tick.

❤️ Made for Survival Players

Whether you're mining, building, or exploring — this mod has your back when your gear is about to give out.
